meaning: Federal National Mortgage Association(美国)联邦国民抵押协会
examples: Standard & Poor's cut Freddie Mac (FMCC. OB) and Fannie Mae's (FNMA. OB) long-term ratings one notch on Monday.
Holdings include FNMA Single Family debt, FGLMC Single Family debt, GNMA Single Family debt, and cash.
Holdings include U.S. Treasuries, Bank of America ( BAC) debt, FNMA Benchmark Notes, and other government and corporate debt.
Interest rates on 5-year FNMA debentures rose to 15 percent.
